import logging

# --- Custom Exceptions ---

class ShoppingCartError(Exception):
    """Base exception for shopping cart errors."""
    pass

class ItemValidationError(ShoppingCartError):
    """Raised when an item fails validation."""
    pass

class OrderProcessingError(ShoppingCartError):
    """Raised when an order fails to process."""
    pass

def calculate_total(prices):
    return sum(prices)

def process_order(order):
    print("Processing order...")
    items = order.get("items", [])
    if not items:
        print("No items in the order.")
        return

    prices = [item["price"] for item in items if "price" in item]
    
    total = calculate_total(prices)
    print(f"Total order value: ${total:.2f}")
    print("Order processed successfully.")
